title: JonatanSansH's Modpack
description: A simple, optimized, and creator-friendly modpack by JonatanSansH that enhances vanilla with shaders, QOL tools, and Flashback — without changing gameplay.
body:
The official modpack of streamer JonatanSansH — built to make your Minecraft experience smoother, prettier, and creator-friendly!
Whether you're a content creator or a casual player, this pack is designed to enhance your gameplay without ever changing the core vanilla experience.

Inside, you’ll find a curated selection of mods crafted to improve comfort, performance, and creativity:

Beautiful shaders and polished texture packs

Powerful optimization mods for a smoother game

Essential building tools like Litematica

Utilities that improve your day-to-day gameplay without affecting vanilla balance

And creator-oriented features such as Flashback, allowing you to record, replay, and capture your gameplay in entirely new ways — an absolute must for modern content creation

This modpack aims to be simple, clean, and easy to use, whether you're recording a timelapse, building a mega-project, or just starting a casual survival world.

Just install it, launch your world, and enjoy the best version of vanilla Minecraft!
